problem: Why do traumatic memories become locked and intrusive — what neural mechanism?
mechanism: Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine
hypothesis: Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine may resolve Why do traumatic memories become locked and intrusive — what neural mechanism? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 23 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
